allow: PowerShell(docker exec airflow-scheduler airflow users create --username admin --firstname Admin --lastname User --role Admin --email admin@example.com --password admin 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec airflow-scheduler bash -c "grep -E 'Extraction complete|ERROR|restaurants|reviews' /opt/airflow/logs/dag_id=review_ingestion_pipeline/run_id=manual_run_002/task_id=extract_reviews/attempt=1.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec mongo mongosh restaurant_reviews --quiet --eval "db.processed_reviews.aggregate\([{'\\$group': {_id: '\\$sentiment_label', count: {'\\$sum': 1}}}]\).toArray\(\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker restart frontend; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | Select-String "bar-label|NLP Score|positive sentiment" | Select-Object -First 3)
PowerShell(if \($?\) { "CSS copied OK" } else { "CSS copy FAILED" })
PowerShell(if \($?\) { "HTML copied OK" } else { "HTML copy FAILED" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'hero'\) { "Hero section found" } else { "Hero NOT found" }; if \($r.Content -match 'Playfair'\) { "Google Fonts found" } else { "Fonts NOT found" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/static/style.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Playfair Display'\) { "Playfair font import: OK" } else { "Playfair: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match 'hero-bg'\) { "Hero styles: OK" } else { "Hero: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match 'unsplash'\) { "Unsplash photo: OK" } else { "Photo: MISSING" })
